description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a minimalist rectangular design, featuring clean white exterior walls and large, flat surfaces. The front of the house includes a driveway with three parking spaces, bordered by landscaped greenery and palm trees. The upper level has a partially open terrace or balcony area, while the rear of the property features a spacious green lawn. Windows are minimal and horizontally oriented, contributing to the sleek, contemporary aesthetic. The roof is flat, and the overall structure emphasizes geometric simplicity and open outdoor spaces. The entryway is understated, with no prominent porch or decorative elements, aligning with the modern architectural style.
description: A modern, two-story rectangular house with a flat roof, white exterior, minimal windows, and a driveway with landscaped greenery and palm trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with three cars, landscaped greenery, palm trees, and the main entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, unadorned white wall with minimal horizontal windows and some visible landscaping at the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large green lawn, upper terrace, and the back of the house with minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the expansive lawn, palm trees, and the flat, featureless side wall of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with no porch, steps, or decorative elements, integrated into the front facade
